query: ( "heat warning" OR "heat alert" OR "extreme heat" OR "heatwave" OR "heat wave" OR "thermal stress" OR "heat stress" OR "urban heat island" OR "high temperature" ) AND ( "syndromic surveillance" OR "excess mortality" OR "premature death" OR "heat stroke" OR "heat exhaustion" OR "heat-related illness" OR "heat-related death" OR "cardiovascular hospitalization" OR "respiratory emergency" OR "public health surveillance" OR "hospital admission" OR "emergency department visit" ) AND ( "population vulnerability" OR "vulnerable population" OR "adaptive capacity" OR "climate adaptation" OR "dose-response" OR "attribution analysis" OR "intervention effectiveness" OR "multi-city study" OR "heat action plan" OR "socioeconomic determinant" ) AND ( "causal pathway" OR "effect modification" OR "counterfactual" OR "propensity score" OR "observational study" OR "epidemiological study" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "interrupted time series" OR "natural experiment" )
